summary: Core Lockdown Checklist API Testing Complete. All 34 API tests pass for lockdown endpoints. All 48 unit tests pass for decision engine, state transitions, provider capability, reconciliation truth table, and mapping validator.
critical_code_review_comments: All lockdown endpoints properly secured with Bearer token authentication
Provider capability matrix correctly returns exely (split_messages ARI) and hotelrunner (single_message ARI)
Truth table correctly defines 7+ drift types with resolution policies
Folio by booking endpoint at /api/folio/booking/{booking_id} returns array as expected (bug fix verified)
Mapping health endpoint correctly returns per-provider health scores
All metrics endpoints (ingest, lineage, reconciliation) return proper structures
seed_data_creation: None - tests work with existing data or empty state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lockdown router at /api/lockdown prefix. All endpoints require auth. Key endpoints: /api/lockdown/status (health check), /api/lockdown/providers/capabilities (provider matrix with exely/hotelrunner), /api/lockdown/reconciliation/truth-table (drift resolution policies), /api/lockdown/health/mapping (mapping health), /api/lockdown/metrics/ingest (pipeline metrics), /api/lockdown/metrics/lineage (reservation metrics), /api/lockdown/metrics/reconciliation (case metrics), /api/lockdown/trace/reservation/{id} (traceability). Folio endpoint at /api/folio/booking/{booking_id} returns array of folios.

GET /api/lockdown/status.notes: Returns status (healthy/degraded), checks (ingest, mapping, reconciliation), timestamp

GET /api/lockdown/providers/capabilities.notes: Returns providers array with exely (split_messages) and hotelrunner (single_message)

GET /api/lockdown/reconciliation/truth-t.notes: Returns truth_table array with 7+ drift types, resolutions, gold_sources

GET /api/lockdown/health/mapping.notes: Returns mapping_health array and overall_production_ready boolean

GET /api/lockdown/metrics/ingest.notes: Returns period_hours, since, totals, rates, decisions

GET /api/lockdown/metrics/lineage.notes: Returns total_lineages, by_status, by_provider, reconciled, unreconciled

GET /api/lockdown/trace/reservation/{ext.notes: Returns external_reservation_id and trace object with raw_events, lineage, reconciliation_cases

GET /api/folio/booking/{booking_id}.notes: Returns array of folios (empty array for non-existent booking) - bug fix verified

Decision Engine.notes: 10 tests - duplicate detection, stale rejection, cancellation wins, unmapped fail, etc.

Mutation Detection.notes: 8 tests - new booking, cancellation, reinstatement, date/room/rate/guest changes

Provider Capability.notes: 9 tests - exely/hotelrunner capabilities, error classification, retry logic

Reconciliation Truth.notes: 6 tests - drift resolution policies, auto-heal detection

Mapping Validator.notes: 7 tests - unmapped/inactive/deleted mapping detection, health computation

mocked_api_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All tests hit real backend via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
